chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 584 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 23.12.2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicant. So was the case on the last date of hearing. Matter stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
